content.en:
The supreme temple of the Terrans.

Ye Tian soon met the Kunwu Supreme and met the Kunwu Supreme in the Kunwu Palace.

Kungo Temple.

When Ye Tian saw the Kunwu Supreme, he found that the Kunwu Supreme's aura was a little weak, and it was obvious that he was injured, but the injury was not very serious, much lighter than the previous injury of the Dark Master.

"I've seen the Kungo Supreme!"

Ye Tian bent down to greet Dao.

"It's nice to hear that you killed a devastating creature in the pan!"

Kunwu Supreme praised.

"I'm just killing the weakest destructive creature, it's not worth mentioning!" Ye Tian said modestly.

"Even the weakest of devastating creatures is remarkable. After all, this kind of creature is too difficult to deal with, and ordinary cosmic gods are not even qualified to fight against the weakest destructive creature. It's a pity, your current cultivation is only at the peak of the galaxy level, how nice it would be if you were now in the Supreme Realm!" Kunwu Supreme sighed.

If Ye Tian is the Supreme, he is definitely the most terrifying Supreme, maybe he can sweep the abyss of destruction with his own strength!

But now, Ye Tian is far from really growing.

"Kunwu Supreme, how is the Broken Abyss now?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

He came this time mainly to inquire about the situation of the Abyss of Destruction, after all, he knew more about it, so he was prepared, and if the situation was more serious, he would be able to deal with it.

"It's stable, but it's not completely resolved!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"The most terrifying destructive creature in the depths of the Abyss of Destruction was suppressed by the first god lord and the first demon lord of the god race and the demon race. And other powerful and destructive creatures that escaped into the universe were also found and killed one by one. Even the weaker creatures of destruction are not much left, and it won't be long before they are found and slain one by one. Now, some powerful people of various races have joined forces to strangle the abyss of destruction on the periphery and quell the turmoil. According to the past practice, those destroying creatures will instinctively return to the depths of the abyss of destruction when they learn that they cannot help the races, and they will not come out again for a long time!"

Hearing Kunwu Supreme say this, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

But suddenly, Kun Wu Supreme said again: "Ye Tian, although the matter of the Destruction Abyss Turmoil has stabilized, we are ready to let a group of genius cultivators who have created the Law Dao enter the Destruction Abyss, and you are definitely the most suitable person." And more suitable than others, your strength can be exerted to a greater extent in the Abyss of Destruction. After all, you have broken boundaries, and your physical strength far surpasses that of others, even of us supremes. "

"What, you want me to enter the abyss of ruin?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Kunwu Supreme, the destruction creature in the abyss of destruction can exert all its strength, even stronger than in the outside world, even if I can exert the terrifying power of the body, but the combat power is definitely not as good as the outside world, even the weakest destruction creature is not an opponent, I enter the abyss of destruction is not looking for death?"

Ye Tian refused on the spot.

Kunwu Supreme explained: "Ye Tian, I haven't finished my words yet. The Abyss of Destruction shielded the origin of the universe, and none of us Supremes dared to enter it, but this time was different. This time, the destruction creature broke out of the abyss of destruction, and the rules of the universe penetrated into some, although it could not be permanently invaded into the abyss of destruction, but at least it could last for hundreds of years. The reason why we sent people into the Abyss of Destruction is because there is a special place in the middle region of the Abyss of Destruction, where there is an amazing opportunity, and it is rumored to be related to the origin of the universe. In the past, some people entered it and gained an amazing increase in strength, such as the first god of the god race and the first demon lord of the demon race who entered the middle level of the abyss of destruction and successfully came out alive. There are many people who enter there, and there are many people who come out, but the highest achievements belong to the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord. It is rumored that there is a special realm there, but we Terrans have not been rising for a long time, and this is the first time we know about that place. But this opportunity is very precious, only for cultivators below the cosmic god, if you don't want to, I won't force it!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and immediately agreed.

"I agree!"

Ye Tian didn't want to give up this opportunity, and when the rules of the universe withdrew from the Abyss of Destruction, even the Protoss and the Demon Race would go all out, and they would not dare to enter the Abyss of Destruction and fight with the creatures of destruction.

Now that the rules of the universe have invaded the Abyss of Destruction, the races have reached the middle region of the Abyss of Destruction and temporarily controlled that place.

So, this is the only chance, and if you miss it, you will have to wait until a long time later.

Then he would have lost this opportunity forever!

So, he didn't want to miss it!

Seeing that Ye Tian agreed, Kunwu Supreme was more pleased.

If Ye Tian refused because of timidity, he might be relieved, but he would definitely be disappointed.

Because a genius who is afraid of danger is not a real genius!

"Okay, I'll arrange it, you can go back and wait for the notice. This is also a chance I can give you to fight for, and there will be no such good opportunity waiting for you next time!" said Kunwu Supreme.

"Thank you Kungo Supreme!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

He also knew very well that there must be many people who wanted this quota among the nine supreme forces of the Terran Race, and there were even many people within the Supreme Hall of the Terran who needed this quota.

However, the Kunwu Supreme still gave him a place, which definitely valued him extremely much, and even caused the dissatisfaction of some people in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

After all, Ye Tian did not belong to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race now, but to the Heavenly Pavilion Master and the membership of the Divine Blade Alliance.

After chatting with the Kunwu Supreme for a while, Ye Tian left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

After returning to the Heavenly Pavilion Headquarters, Ye Tian was in retreat while waiting for rest.

One day for five months.

The Kunwu Supreme sent someone to summon Ye Tian again.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the Kunwu Supreme again.

"Ye Tian, when the time comes, I'll take you to the abyss in person. There's still some danger there, and you won't be able to get there without the Supreme Escort!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian completely obeyed the arrangement.

Subsequently.

Under the escort of the Kunwu Supreme, Ye Tian came to the Abyss of Destruction within a few days.

Unlike the Abyss of Destruction seen in the past, the Abyss of Destruction now has a more terrifying aura of destruction and stronger pressure.

Moreover, this area was filled with the aura of the Supreme and some terrifying aura of destruction, so that Ye Tian almost froze his divine consciousness just by sensing it.

Obviously, the power of this kind of existence is only a trace, and it is not something that Ye Tian can withstand.

In the vicinity of the Abyss of Destruction, the Terrans also established a temporary small base, and Ye Tian was brought into the temporary small base.

"Wait a few more days, and when the time is almost there, we will send them to that place. This time, it is the two super clans of the Protoss and the Demon Clan who are in charge, Ye Tian, before you enter that place, you must not have a conflict with the people of the Protoss and the Demon Clan, lest it be difficult to deal with the time!" Kunwu Supreme reminded.

"Kunwu Supreme, don't worry, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

In the blink of an eye, a few days have arrived.

Some of the top galaxial-level and galaxy-level powerhouses of the human race have arrived, a total of about eighteen, and the galaxy-level and galaxy-level of other races have basically arrived.

Then.

Two majestic figures appeared in the void, as if covering the entire void.

"The First Divine Master of the Protoss!"

"The First Demon Lord of the Demon Race!"

Ye Tian looked at these two figures and muttered in his heart.
